narrative:
Clay 2 (Genoa) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 616 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
